languages.text: {n}Огромное тело Ульфара вскидывается с яростным воем. Он обрушивает кулаки на панель, оставляя на ней стремительно затягивающиеся вмятины, и поднимает голову, свирепо дыша.{/n} "Каждый из железных чужаков заплатит за это кровавую виру!"
languages.translation_comment:
Ульфар в шоке
Анимация: бьет консоль врукопашную

traits.locale_text: {n}Огромное тело Ульфара вскидывается с яростным воем. Он обрушивает кулаки на панель, оставляя на ней стремительно затягивающиеся вмятины, и поднимает голову, свирепо дыша.{/n} "Каждый из железных чужаков заплатит за это кровавую виру!"
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.translation_comment:
Ульфар в шоке
Анимация: бьет консоль врукопашную

languages.text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"
languages.original_text: {n}Огромное тело Ульфара вскидывается с яростным воем. Он обрушивает кулаки на панель, оставляя на ней стремительно затягивающиеся вмятины, и поднимает голову, свирепо дыша.{/n} "Каждый из железных чужаков заплатит за это кровавую виру!"

traits.locale_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

[draft]{n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar rears his whole giant body, then brings both of his fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to heal. He raises his head, breathing fiercely.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

{n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

{n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

languages.text: {n}乌尔法发出一声怒吼，庞大的身躯猛地挺起，然后双拳狠狠砸向控制台，留下数处凹痕，而后那金属表面迅速开始自我修复。他抬起头，胸膛剧烈起伏。{/n}“那些铁皮恶棍，一个也跑不了，都得用血来偿命！”
languages.original_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

traits.locale_text: {n}乌尔法发出一声怒吼，庞大的身躯猛地挺起，然后双拳狠狠砸向控制台，留下数处凹痕，而后那金属表面迅速开始自我修复。他抬起头，胸膛剧烈起伏。{/n}“那些铁皮恶棍，一个也跑不了，都得用血来偿命！”

languages.text: {n}Con un rugido de furia, el cuerpo gigantesco de Ulfar se yergue antes de golpear con ambos puños el panel, dejando unas mellas que empiezan a repararse al momento. Alza la cabeza mientras su pecho se alza y desciende con sus jadeos.{/n} «¡Cada uno de esos malhechores de hierro pagará en sangre por esto!».
languages.original_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Con un rugido de furia, el cuerpo gigantesco de Ulfar se yergue antes de golpear con ambos puños el panel, dejando unas mellas que empiezan a repararse al momento. Alza la cabeza mientras su pecho se alza y desciende con sus jadeos.{/n} «¡Cada uno de esos malhechores de hierro pagará en sangre por esto!».

languages.text: {n}Dans un rugissement furieux, la formidable silhouette d'Ulfar se cabre, puis il abat ses deux poings sur le panneau, laissant des anfractuosités qui ne tardent pas à s'autoréparer. Il relève la tête, haletant.{/n} « Ces mécréants de fer paieront le prix du sang, jusqu'au dernier ! »
languages.original_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans un rugissement furieux, la formidable silhouette d'Ulfar se cabre, puis il abat ses deux poings sur le panneau, laissant des anfractuosités qui ne tardent pas à s'autoréparer. Il relève la tête, haletant.{/n} « Ces mécréants de fer paieront le prix du sang, jusqu'au dernier ! »

languages.text: {n}Öfkeli bir kükremeyle Ulfar'ın dev bedeni şahlanıyor ve ardından iki yumruğunu birden panelin üzerine indirerek hızla kendini onarmaya başlayan ezikler bırakıyor. Başını kaldırıyor, göğsü inip kalkıyor.{/n} "O demir alçakların her biri kanla diyet ödeyecek!"
languages.original_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Öfkeli bir kükremeyle Ulfar'ın dev bedeni şahlanıyor ve ardından iki yumruğunu birden panelin üzerine indirerek hızla kendini onarmaya başlayan ezikler bırakıyor. Başını kaldırıyor, göğsü inip kalkıyor.{/n} "O demir alçakların her biri kanla diyet ödeyecek!"

languages.text: {n}Mit einem wütenden Schrei richtet Ulfar sich zu seiner ganzen Größe auf und schlägt mit beiden Fäusten auf die Konsole, die sich sofort selbst repariert. Er hebt mit bebender Brust den Kopf.{/n} "Jede einzelne dieser eisernen Missgeburten wird ein Wergeld in Blut bezahlen!"
languages.original_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem wütenden Schrei richtet Ulfar sich zu seiner ganzen Größe auf und schlägt mit beiden Fäusten auf die Konsole, die sich sofort selbst repariert. Er hebt mit bebender Brust den Kopf.{/n} "Jede einzelne dieser eisernen Missgeburten wird ein Wergeld in Blut bezahlen!"

languages.text: {n}怒りの咆哮と共に、ウルファルの巨体は立ち上がり、両拳をパネルに叩きつける。パネルには深い傷が刻まれたが、すぐに修復が始まった。彼は息を荒くしながら顔を上げ、{/n}「鉄の悪党どもは血で償う！」
languages.original_text: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"

traits.locale_text: {n}怒りの咆哮と共に、ウルファルの巨体は立ち上がり、両拳をパネルに叩きつける。パネルには深い傷が刻まれたが、すぐに修復が始まった。彼は息を荒くしながら顔を上げ、{/n}「鉄の悪党どもは血で償う！」
